name: PHASE-53 D4 S371 — shared URL dedup on the targeted path: two below-floor claims (base 0.4472), discovery returns the SAME url for both → claim-1 ingests it (worse, 0.3162 → keep-best keeps the original); claim-2 hits the SHARED in-run dedup set → NO second ingest (discovery_ingests stays 1) AND the redundant re-retrieve is skipped (kb.retrieve/embed call count = 3, not 4). Both claims cited from their original sets, both flagged below_floor.
